title: Efficiency packages
description: Schema for rows in families/<family_id>/efficiency_packages.csv. Each row describes a family-local selectable efficiency package for one milestone year.

family_id.description: Canonical family identifier. Must match the owning folder and shared/families.csv.

package_id.description: Stable family-local identifier for the efficiency package.

year.description: Milestone year represented by this row.

package_description.description: Plain-language description of the package and what it changes.

classification.description: Package class. V1 allows pure efficiency overlays and operational efficiency overlays only.

applicable_state_ids.description: JSON-encoded array of explicit state_id values that the package may modify.

affected_input_commodities.description: JSON-encoded array of commodity identifiers affected by the package. Keep aligned one-for-one with input_multipliers.

input_multipliers.description: JSON-encoded array of numeric multipliers aligned one-for-one with affected_input_commodities.

delta_output_cost_per_unit.description: Additive change to output_cost_per_unit relative to the base state in the same family and year.

cost_basis_year.description: Base year used to normalize delta_output_cost_per_unit.

currency.description: Currency or price basis label for delta_output_cost_per_unit, such as AUD_2024.

max_share.description: Optional upper bound on the share of applicable activity this package may reach in the given year.

rollout_limit_notes.description: Narrative explanation for any rollout, adoption, or eligibility limits.

source_ids.description: JSON-encoded array of source IDs that should resolve in shared/source_ledger.csv.

assumption_ids.description: JSON-encoded array of assumption IDs that should resolve in shared/assumptions_ledger.csv.

evidence_summary.description: Short summary of the evidence base supporting this package row.

derivation_method.description: Brief note on how the row was derived, scaled, or interpolated.

confidence_rating.description: Qualitative confidence class for the row.

review_notes.description: Reviewer caveats, unresolved questions, or quality flags that should stay visible downstream.

non_stacking_group.description: Optional family-local group used to prevent overlapping packages from stacking on the same slice of activity.
